CONTENT.Club career: After playing youth football with TSV Tutzing, Bayern Munich and VfB Stuttgart, Hollerbach signed for Wehen Wiesbaden on a three-year contract in September 2020.In July 2023, Hollerbach signed for Union Berlin, moving to the top-flight Bundesliga for the first time in his career.
CONTENT.External links: Benedict Hollerbach at WorldFootball.netBenedict Hollerbach at kicker (in German)Benedict Hollerbach at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.International career: Hollerbach has represented Germany at under-18 level.

SUMMARY: Benedict Hollerbach (born 17 May 2001) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left winger or centre-forward for Bundesliga side Union Berlin. He has played for Germany at under-18 level.
